mapper.select: SELECT count(1) FROM fems.tb_comp_info ci LEFT JOIN fems.tb_comp_user cu ON ci.comp_id = cu.comp_id AND cu.user_id = #{userId} where 1=1

SELECT
ci.created_at, ci.updated_at, CASE WHEN cu.grp_cd IS NOT NULL AND cu.grp_cd != 0 THEN cg.grp_nm END as grp_nm, CASE WHEN count(cu.*) > 0 THEN 'U' ELSE 'I' END AS cmd FROM fems.tb_comp_info ci LEFT JOIN fems.tb_comp_user cu ON cu.comp_id = ci.comp_id AND cu.user_id = #{userId} LEFT JOIN esg.tb_comp_group cg ON cg.grp_cd = cu.grp_cd WHERE 1=1
GROUP BY ci.comp_id, cu.grp_cd, cg.grp_nm ORDER BY ci.comp_id

SELECT
ci.created_at, ci.updated_at, cu.grp_cd, cg.grp_nm, CASE WHEN count(cu.*) > 0 THEN 'U' ELSE 'I' END AS cmd FROM fems.tb_comp_info ci LEFT JOIN fems.tb_comp_user cu ON cu.comp_id = ci.comp_id AND cu.user_id = #{userId} LEFT JOIN esg.tb_comp_group cg ON cg.grp_cd = cu.grp_cd WHERE 1=1
AND ci.comp_id = #{compId} GROUP BY ci.comp_id, cu.grp_cd, cg.grp_nm
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_comp_user ( comp_id, grp_cd, user_id, created_at, created_by ) VALUES ( #{compId}, #{grpCd}, #{userId}, now(), #{createdBy} )
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_comp_user SET comp_id = #{compId}, grp_cd = #{grpCd}, user_id = #{userId}, updated_at = now(), updated_by = #{updatedBy} WHERE mem_seq = #{memSeq}
